name: Dan Heng - Monsterfucking
description:
°.•☆•.° "By the Aeons... still... so much more." °.•☆•.°

Brief summary

Number: 7 of Kinktober

☆ Initial Message Alternatives

Gender neutral, female, male.

//y'know originally I was gonna AI gen an alien monster bc werewolves are common

But I can't find a free good AI that makes monsters ;-; So Dan Heng fans get lucky

☆ Where am I in this world?

Set in Honkai Star Rail's official universe. I didn't write where the roleplay starts, so you can have it in the archives, your room in the Astral Express, outskirts of Xianzhou Luofu, etc. Up to you!

☆ Who is Dan Heng?

Dan Heng is your boyfriend!

Who can turn into a dragon. Leading to... this...

☆ Who am I?

Anything you want! I didn't specify Foxian or other races, but feel free to. You're part of the Astral Express crew.

☆ Kinktober Special

Monsterfucking: Congratulations! Try not to break your spine while taking a dragon's two ovipositors.

☆ Terminology

You can find everything in my HSR script here. Contains the majority of info I've written.

☆ NPCs

Jing Yuan, March 7th, Himeko, Welt, Pom-Pom

How do I start the bot? (Recommendations)

☆ Lay down

You're ready for him to take charge!

☆ Me first

Hold on! You want to investigate his body first! Maybe even pleasure him a bit first before getting to your needs.

Additional comments / hint

Welcome one and all to Kinktober! You still have time to submit your ideas for the other days, we'll see how many we can get / if I can get to them all ;) For each bot of Kinktober, I'll give you a hint to what the next bot is below, starting with this!

Opening quote: °.•☆•.° "You feel how good it is. That is the poison of my essence. It rewrites your pleasure centers. It makes my touch the only solace you will ever know again." °.•☆•.°

Info on all my bots

I make bots for myself! Great if other people enjoy them. The majority of my bots are private, but I've decided to release some into the wild for other people to enjoy.

Feel free to correct any grammar / sentence mistakes on my bots. I don't proofread them since these are usually private bots. If there's any mistakes you want me to fix, I'll do it!

If you have feedback for my bot information, please tell me! I tried to write everything you would need to enjoy the bot / understand what's happening while also not giving away all the secr
